{"id":129,"count":6,"description":"Trail Updates provide factual, verified information related to Cebu's documented trails. Updates may include official announcements, access changes, trail closures, conservation efforts, community activities, organized hiking events, infrastructure improvements, and significant environmental developments that may affect the hiking experience.","link":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/category\/news\/","name":"News","slug":"news","taxonomy":"category","parent":0,"meta":[],"_links":{"self":[{"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/categories\/129","targetHints":{"allow":["GET"]}}],"collection":[{"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/categories"}],"about":[{"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/taxonomies\/category"}],"wp:post_type":[{"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/posts?categories=129"}],"curies":[{"name":"wp","href":"https:\/\/api.w.org\/{rel}","templated":true}]}}
